name: Marbled Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the Cream Cheese Filling: Beat all filling ingredients together until smooth, scraping the bowl occasionally.
3. Heat margarine and chocolate over low heat, stirring occasionally, until melted. Allow to cool slightly.
4. In a large bowl, beat together the chocolate mixture, sugar, vanilla, and eggs on medium speed for 1 minute, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Beat in flour and salt on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl occasionally.
6. Beat on medium speed for an additional 1 minute.
7. Stir in nuts.
8. Spread half of the batter into a greased square pan (9 x 9 x 2 inches).
9. Spread with the Cream Cheese Filling.
10. Gently spread the remaining batter over the filling.
11. Gently swirl the batter with a spoon in an over-and-under motion for a marbled effect.
12. Bake until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 55 to 65 minutes.
13. Allow to cool completely.
14. Cut into 1-1/2 x 1-inch bars (54 bars).
